title: Cream Finance - REKT 2
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by manipulate price and withdraw large amounts on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls deposit() or borrow() in the same tx after a flash loan
prevention.trigger: FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> deposit() || borrow() in single tx

red_flags: Repeated lending and borrowing with flash-loaned funds
Price manipulation to double collateral value
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls deposit() or borrow() in the same tx after a flash loan
summary: The attacker exploited a pricing vulnerability by repeatedly lending and borrowing flash-loaned funds across two addresses, manipulating the price to double the value of collateral, and then withdrawing large amounts from the lending vaults.
